## Summary

- 

## Change Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] build / release
- [ ] chore

## Scope And Risk

- User impact:
- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Affected surfaces: desktop / web / backend / agent engine / MCP / packaging / docs
- Linked issue: Fixes # / Refs # / Towards #

## Verification

- [ ] Commands run:
- [ ] Not run, with reason:

## Documentation, I18n, And Assets

- [ ] Documentation updated or not needed
- [ ] `zh-CN` and `en-US` i18n updated or not needed
- [ ] Screenshots or screen recording attached for visible UI changes
- [ ] `docs/images/SCREENSHOTS.md` updated when screenshots changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing release notes or not needed

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, provider keys, local data, or private paths added
- [ ] No generated build output committed
- [ ] New dependencies/assets have compatible redistribution licenses
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is explained in the PR notes
